encode_offer.doc: serializes a spend bundle into the standard Chia offer file format (bech32m-encoded string).

decode_offer.doc: deserializes a Chia offer file string (bech32m-encoded) back into a spend bundle.

NotarizedPayment.doc: represents a notarized payment used in Chia offers, binding a nonce to a list of payments for atomic swap settlement.

Payment.doc: represents a single payment output in an offer: a destination puzzle hash, amount, and optional memos.
